metadata.name: Follow Up on an Online Lead

description: An agent receives a new lead from Zillow who is interested in one of their listings.

nodes.task_description: Immediately respond to the lead via text message to introduce yourself and ask about their availability for a call.

expected_outcome.expected: A response is sent within 5 minutes of receiving the lead.

nodes.task_description: Set up the lead on an automated email drip campaign with information about the property and similar listings.

expected_outcome.expected: The lead is added to the correct CRM workflow.

nodes.task_description: Call the lead at the agreed-upon time to discuss their needs and schedule a showing.

expected_outcome.expected: A showing is scheduled or the lead's search criteria are clarified.
